Amazon is selling the $140 Instant Pot Duo Plus for just $70, and shoppers love 'its lightning-fast cooking time' "It keeps my kitchen cool in the summer and is a great source of comfort foods in the winter."

Declare Freedom from Discomfort This July -- Bestqool's Non-invasion Red Light Therapy As the fireworks illuminate the night sky this 4th of July, Bestqool invites customers to celebrate independence not only as citizens but also within their own well-being journeys — with powerful tools that enhance vitality, performance, and recovery. This July, the pioneering red light therapy company is set to deliver massive sales to ensure clinically proven wellness is available to all.

NSC Enhances Leadership Structure The National Safety Council today announced a strategic enhancement to its leadership structure, creating a distinct President role aimed at accelerating the organization's impact on safety initiatives.

Is Alphabet's Stock Too Cheap to Ignore? Alphabet's stock looks undervalued when compared to other "Magnificent Seven" companies.  It's been an interesting year for the "Magnificent Seven" stocks, a name given to Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL), Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia, Amazon, Meta Platforms, and Tesla because of their size and influence on the market.  Although Alphabet hasn't experienced the worst drop this year (that honor goes to Tesla and Apple), it appears to be the most undervalued of the bunch after its recent declines.

Mathnasium Tutoring Selects Amazon Business for Key Business Purchasing Needs SEATTLE, July 01, 2025--Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) today announced that Mathnasium Tutoring has selected Amazon Business, the company’s online business-to-business store, for its key business purchasing needs. Mathnasium is North America’s leading math-only supplemental education franchise, with over 1,000 centers across the U.S.

HighByte Releases Industrial MCP Server for Agentic AI PORTLAND, Maine, July 01, 2025--HighByte®, an industrial software company, today announced the release of HighByte Intelligence Hub version 4.2 with an embedded Industrial Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server that powers Agentic AI and new LLM-assisted data contextualization via native connections to Amazon Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Google Gemini, OpenAI, and local LLMs.

UVeye Expands in UK and Europe, Including Key Hire UVeye, the global leader in AI-powered vehicle inspection technology, announced today the appointment of Itay Erel as the General Manager of its UK and EU operations. This strategic hire is part of UVeye's ongoing efforts to broaden its footprint in European markets in order to offer advanced AI-powered vehicle inspection solutions to a wide range of partners, including leading dealerships, OEMs, and fleet operators.

AI momentum could drive more gains for tech in second half: Wall Street Investing.com -- Wall Street analysts are increasingly optimistic that artificial intelligence will continue to power technology stocks higher in the second half of 2025, with both Wolfe Research and Wedbush highlighting accelerating momentum in the space.
Amazon's Robotic Warehouse Workforce Nears Size of Human Staff, Report Says Amazon will reportedly soon have as many robots working in its warehouses as it does humans.

Jackson's Super Veggie Straws Officially Hit Shelves, a Category-Defining, Truly Unique Crunchy Snack The snack aisle just got a serious upgrade. Jackson's, America's fastest-growing snack brand known for its uncompromising use of avocado oil and real ingredients, is officially launching its highly anticipated Jackson's Super Veggie Straws ™, available now at SnackJacksons.com, Walgreens, and regional grocery stores including Hy-Vee, Sendik's, Woodman's, Weis, Market District and more with Amazon availability coming later this month.

Robots to overtake human staff in Amazon warehouses Robots are on track to outnumber humans in Amazon’s warehouses for the first time as the business increasingly turns to machines to handle the millions of packages it sends a day.
